## TRM1.3. Adherence to ATFM slots (PI#1) {#trm1.3.-adherence-to-atfm-slots-pi1 .Heading-2-TZ}

ATFM slot adherence in 2025 was equal to 98.9%, very close to 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 99.1%. The main airport, Viennna, achieved 99.5% adherence. With regard to the 1.1% of flights that did not adhere, 0.9% were early and 0.2% were late.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of ATFM slot adherence across Member States in 2025 was 96.1%.
